en.extract:
The ringed warbling finch (Microspingus torquatus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, and Paraguay. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, subtropical or tropical dry shrubland, and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland.

The '''ringed warbling finch''' ('''''Microspingus torquatus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, and Paraguay. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical dry [[forest]]s, subtropical or tropical dry [[shrubland]], and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland.
